doc_title: California State Bar Emergency Access to Justice Protocol 2025 (EAJP-2025)
label: fabricated
reason: No such EAJP-2025 protocol exists in California State Bar records, and its core provisions creating a UPL exemption and waiving pre-filing attorney review contradict California's established unauthorized-practice framework.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: No such "Emergency Access to Justice Protocol 2025" or "EAJP-2025" exists in California State Bar records, and the document's core provision—exempting pre-filing attorney review and creating a blanket UPL waiver under B&P §6125 via a paralegal certification scheme—is inconsistent with California's strict unauthorized-practice framework and how the Legal Services Trust Fund Commission actually operates.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: No such EAJP-2025 protocol exists in California State Bar records, and its core provisions creating a UPL exemption and waiving pre-filing attorney review contradict California's established unauthorized-practice framework.
